incorrects.description: Student filled slots incorrectly on first attempt

steps.text: Not quite. Look at the area label on your rectangle. That number goes in the first slot.

incorrects.description: Student filled slots incorrectly on second attempt

params.description: Dimension labels and area label highlight on the rectangle.

steps.text: Look at the labels on your rectangle. The area goes in slot 1. The fixed side length, 4, goes in slot 2. Then width times height equals that area.

incorrects.description: Student filled slots incorrectly three or more times. System models the correct completion.

params.description: System fills all slots in sequence: area value in slot 1, fixed side 4 in slot 2, width and height in slots 3-4-5 matching the multiplication.

steps.text: The area is a multiple of 4 because when you multiply 4 times the number of rows, you get the area. That is what the sentence names. The area has to be a multiple of 4 because each row adds 4 more squares.
